Item Name: Bragg Organic Coconut Aminos, Soy-Free Seasoning - Vegan, Gluten Free, No GMO’s, Kosher Certified (128 Ounce)
Bullet Point 1: BRAGG COCONUT LIQUID AMINOS: A sweet, soy-free teriyaki sauce replacement made with Bragg Apple Cider Vinegar, organic coconut blossom nectar, and Balinese sea salt
Bullet Point 2: TERIYAKI SAUCE ALTERNATIVE: A no-soy alternative to teriyaki sauce perfect for elevating the flavor on any dish
Bullet Point 3: SOY-FREE SEASONING: Liquid soy-free seasoning combines an umami-packed flavor with 16 essential and non-essential amino acids
Bullet Point 4: VERSATILE SEASONING: Great for stir-fries with fish, tofu, chicken, or beef, as well as marinades, dressings, soups, vegetables, rice, and more
Bullet Point 5: THE BRAGG DIFFERENCE: Organic, Vegan, Alcohol-free, Gluten-free, Kosher, Non-GMO Project Verified, and Paleo-friendly
Product Description: Bragg Organic Coconut Liquid Aminos is the perfect soy-free seasoning for adding rich, umami flavor to your favorite dishes. This teriyaki sauce alternative is made from organic coconut blossom nectar, world-famous Bragg Apple Cider Vinegar, and Balinese sea salt. Bragg Coconut Aminos are a perfect choice for marinades, stir-fries, soups, and more. Whether you're cooking for yourself or family, this versatile seasoning enhances any dish with bold flavor. Each bottle is crafted with the Bragg difference, delivering quality and taste you can trust.
Value: 128.0
Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Mid-tier specialty seasoning with strong health and dietary certifications (organic, vegan, gluten-free, non-GMO, kosher) justifying a premium price over generic alternatives. Bulk 128 FL OZ size offers cost efficiency for frequent use, targeting health-conscious and soy-sensitive consumers. Brand heritage and functional versatility across dishes enhance perceived value, though plastic packaging suggests cost-conscious production.
